rationale: Diff contains only execution metadata (manifest.json, result.json) under .ddx/executions/. No source code changes for PROV-O serialization, content negotiation, query parameter handling, or tests are present. None of AC1–AC5 can be evaluated as implemented.

findings.summary: AC1 not evaluable: no code adding Accept: application/ld+json content negotiation or ?format=prov query parameter on audit endpoints in the diff.
AC2 not evaluable: no audit handler/serializer changes shown to confirm native JSON shape is preserved.
AC3 not evaluable: no PROV-O serializer, @context, or ontology validation code/tests in the diff.
AC4 not evaluable: no round-trip (JSON → PROV-O → re-import) test present in the diff.
AC5 not evaluable from diff: no source changes to run cargo test/clippy against; only execution metadata files were added.

Commit f670ef3 ('add execution evidence') appears to only commit ddx execution artifacts; the actual implementation commit (25876f2 'feat(audit): add PROV-O serialization') is referenced as result_rev but its changes are not included in this review's diff.
